decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and pump them up with various anthem effects like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory. Thalia, Guardian of Thraben helps to disrupt the opponent's spells while Hexing Squelcher and Static Prison provide additional control elements. Goblin Bombardment adds reach and removal, while Swords to Plowshares deals with problematic creatures. The deck also utilizes land destruction with Wasteland and disruption with Karakas. Overall, this Boros Aggro deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain board control to secure victory.

The main focus of this UWx Control deck is to maintain board control and card advantage through a combination of counterspells, removal, draw spells, and planeswalkers. With a mix of powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo and Teferi, along with versatile cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while generating value over the course of the game. The inclusion of cards like Lórien Revealed and Flow State further enhances the deck's ability to draw cards and outvalue the opponent in the long game.

The deck utilizes a combination of land recursion, control elements, and land destruction to establish a powerful board presence and limit the opponent's options. By using cards like Life from the Loam and Exploration to repeatedly play lands, the deck can quickly assemble the powerful Dark Depths/Thespian's Stage combo to create a 20/20 Marit Lage token. Additionally, cards like Wasteland and Boseiju, Who Endures allow for disruption and protection against opposing strategies. Overall, the deck aims to control the game through efficient land usage and manipulation.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By combining the speed and power of creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Amped Raptor with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize, the deck puts pressure on the opponent from multiple angles. The inclusion of cards like Goblin Bombardment and Cabal Therapy adds another layer of disruption and allows for additional ways to control the game. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent access to the deck's powerful spells.

The main concept behind this deck is to quickly assemble the Aluren combo, allowing you to cast creatures like Atraxa and Acererak for free while also drawing cards and controlling the board with counterspells and other protection spells. By combining Show and Tell with Aluren and potentially Omniscience, you can quickly overwhelm your opponent with powerful creatures and game-winning plays. The deck also includes ways to ramp mana and ensure consistency in drawing the necessary pieces to execute your game plan efficiently.

The deck focuses on creating a powerful combo using Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to quickly generate a 20/20 Marit Lage token. It utilizes cards like Crop Rotation and Green Sun's Zenith to search for combo pieces, while also running removal and protection spells like Swords to Plowshares and Sylvan Safekeeper. The deck also includes utility lands like Bojuka Bog and Karakas for disruption and protection. Overall, the deck is built around efficiently assembling the Dark Depths combo while controlling the game with versatile spells and land selections.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive Merfolk creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Lord of Atlantis and Master of the Pearl Trident to boost the power of all Merfolk on the board, along with disruptive cards like Harbinger of the Tides and Force of Will to control the game, the deck aims to apply pressure and win the game quickly. The deck also includes utility creatures like True-Name Nemesis and Svyelun of Sea and Sky to provide additional support and card advantage. Island and Cavern of Souls help with mana fixing, while Wasteland disrupts the opponent's mana base.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's resources through cards like Smallpox, Thoughtseize, and Wasteland while leveraging the value provided by Urza's Saga and Life from the Loam to create a strong board presence. Additionally, the deck aims to slowly grind out advantage with cards like Eumidian Hatchery and Grist, the Hunger Tide while utilizing the graveyard as a resource with cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis. The deck also includes a toolbox of cards like Pithing Needle and Witherbloom Charm to handle various situations effectively.

The main concept of this Aluren combo deck is to use Aluren as a central piece to cheat powerful creatures like Acererak the Archlich and Atraxa, Grand Unifier into play for free. By combining cards like Show and Tell and Stock Up with Aluren, the deck aims to quickly assemble a game-winning board state while also disrupting opponents with counterspells like Force of Will. The deck also includes mana acceleration through Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb to help bring out key cards like Omniscience. The deck's strategy ultimately revolves around leveraging Aluren's ability to create explosive plays and overwhelm opponents.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and powerful combat tricks to overwhelm opponents quickly. It includes resilient threats like Ajani and Emrakul, backed up by efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares. The deck also includes some versatile utility cards like Containment Priest and Goblin Bombardment to disrupt opponent strategies and apply pressure. With a mix of strong creatures, removal, and disruptive elements, this deck aims to establish early board dominance and maintain pressure throughout the game.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures and disruption spells to maintain tempo and control the pace of the game. By combining efficient threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent with powerful disruption like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, the deck aims to apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and versatility, while cards like Brainstorm and Ponder help with consistency. The mana base is designed to support the blue-black color combination required for this aggressive tempo strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing lands to control the game. By utilizing cards like Crop Rotation and Life from the Loam, the deck aims to build up a powerful board presence while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Wasteland and Pithing Needle. Cards like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage can be combined to create a powerful 20/20 Marit Lage token, while Boseiju, Who Endures protects important spells. The deck also features cards like Urza's Saga for additional value. Overall, the deck aims to control the game through powerful land interactions and disruption.

The main concept of this deck is to use cards that interact with the graveyard, such as Life from the Loam and Endurance, to control the board and disrupt the opponent's gameplan. With access to powerful land-based cards like Urza's Saga and Wasteland, the deck can generate value and tempo advantage while keeping the opponent on the back foot. The inclusion of various utility lands and versatile spells like Witherbloom Command allows for flexibility in different matchups, while also providing win conditions through cards like Grist, the Hunger Tide.

The deck focuses on setting up a combo using cards like Painter's Servant and Grindstone to mill your opponent's library. It also utilizes Goblin Engineer and Welder to tutor for and recur key artifacts. The deck aims to control the game with cards like Ensnaring Bridge and Pyroblast, while also generating mana and card advantage with cards like Urza's Saga and Melded Moxite. The inclusion of various artifact-based threats like Chaos Defiler and Phyrexian Dragon Engine adds versatility to the deck's game plan. Ultimately, the goal is to assemble the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure a victory.
